title: (Location via IWM) Wellington Memorial

memorial_type: Cairn with large wooden Latin cross and smaller wooden cross with metal plaque; refreshed annually on anniversary

external_narratives.summary: IWM War Memorials Register entry for Wellington T2520 crash memorial. The cairn marks the site where all six crew were killed on return from a bombing mission to Bordeaux on 9-10 December 1940.
key_details: Cairn with wooden cross and metal plaque

external_narratives.summary: Photographic record of the memorial at the Wellington T2520 crash site, showing the cairn structure with crosses and commemorative plaque in its landscape setting.
key_details: Memorial photographed and documented on Geograph
